surface.why_relevant: Auth moved out of codex-core into a dedicated crate, changing package ownership and cross-crate authority assumptions.
analysis_implications: Track auth functionality as a separate ownership target from core.
Use crate-split detection to avoid stale core-centric summaries.
recent_signals: Auth implementation and token data moved into codex-login.
